query:
SELECT id, runSlot, status, errorMessage, adminApproved, 
  CHAR_LENGTH(topicsRaw) as topicsRawLen,
  CHAR_LENGTH(topicsShortlisted) as topicsShortlistedLen,
  CHAR_LENGTH(topicsSelected) as topicsSelectedLen,
  LEFT(topicsSelected, 200) as topicsSelectedPreview,
  createdAt, updatedAt
FROM content_runs ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
